I don't hate GTA V, in fact I think it deserves that love and popularity it gets, but I also think GTA IV deserves the same kind of recognition because it is just as great as GTA V, but if anything, I have my opinions and I still consider GTA IV to be my favorite, but I don't deny that IV has it's flaws, and so does V.
